name: agentic-commerce-blueprint
description: Runnable reference implementation for agent-commerce decision envelopes, authenticators, evidence pins, freshness horizons, generated-claim gates, and surface projections.

scripts.examples: node src/examples/travel-backpack.mjs && node src/examples/stale-price.mjs && node src/examples/generated-claim-capability.mjs && node src/examples/payment-artifact-evidence.mjs && node src/examples/projections.mjs
scripts.check: npm test && npm run validate:shape && npm run examples
